menu.newsletterPitch: The best way to dey up to date on THORChain

footer.riskTooltip: Even as we build dis website with care, e fit get bugs wey we no plan for, wey fit make di site no work well or even make you lose money. Continue only if you understand and accept dis risks.
footer.reportBug: Report a Bug / Request a Feature

bug.title: Report a Bug / Request a Feature
bug.success: Thank you! We don receive your report.

confirm.sourceAddressTooltip: Di wallet address wey dey send di money for dis swap.
confirm.destinationAddressTooltip: Di wallet address wey go receive di money wey you swap.
confirm.refundAddressTooltip: Di address where dem go send your money back if di swap no fit complete.
confirm.limitPriceTooltip: Di price per unit wey your limit order go execute. Di order go only fill when market reach dis price.
confirm.targetAmountTooltip: Di exact amount wey you go receive when your limit order execute for di price wey you set.
confirm.minimumPayoutTooltip: Na di minimum wey we guarantee say you go receive for your {protection} price protection setting. If market move reach where you go receive less, dem go cancel di swap and refund you.
confirm.priceImpactTooltip: How much your swap dey move di Pool price. Di bigger your swap compare to di liquidity wey dey, di higher di price impact.
confirm.slippageToleranceTooltip1: Di difference between your {protection} price protection and di price impact.
confirm.slippageToleranceTooltip2: For di time between when you see quote and when your swap complete, price fit change. Slippage tolerance na di maximum price change wey you go accept before dem cancel di swap.
confirm.includedFeesTooltip: Dis fees dey inside di rate already — you no dey pay dem separately.

warning.highPriceImpact: I understand say di price impact dey on top di slippage tolerance. I accept di high price impact on dis swap
warning.sendExact: I understand say I must send exactly di amount wey dem talk from a self-custody wallet. I understand say if I send from a smart contract wallet, exchange address, delegated address, or EIP 7702 wallet, e go cause
warning.ltcMweb: I understand say if I use LTC MWEB address e go cause
warning.selfCustody: I understand say I must use a self-custody wallet. I understand say if I use a smart contract wallet, exchange address, delegated address, or EIP 7702 wallet, e go cause

instant.sendDescription: Send exactly {amount} {ticker} to di address wey dey below from a self custody wallet.

feeDialog.description: Dis fees dey inside di rate already — you no dey pay dem separately.
feeDialog.liquidityFeeInfo: Fee for liquidity providers on di route

limitCancel.descriptionModify: If you change dis limit order, e go update di target price. Small network fee go apply to process di change.
limitCancel.descriptionCancel: If you cancel dis limit order, dem go return di money wey you deposit to your wallet. Small network fee go apply to process di cancellation.

error.loadInboundAddresses: E no fit load inbound addresses
error.cancelFailed: E no fit cancel limit swap
error.modifyFailed: E no fit change limit swap

toast.sendToCancel: Send {amount} {ticker} from di original wallet to cancel
toast.sendToModify: Send {amount} {ticker} from di original wallet to change am

warning.memolessDeposit: To {mode} dis order, send di deposit from di original {chain} wallet wey place am
warning.connectOrMemoless: Connect a {chain} wallet or use di memoless deposit to {mode} dis order
warning.connect: Connect a {chain} wallet to {mode} dis order
warning.switch: Switch to a {chain} wallet to {mode} dis order
warning.addressMismatch: Di wallet wey connect no match di address wey place dis order

settings.priceProtectionTooltip1: Price impact na how much your swap dey move di Pool price. Di bigger your swap compare to di liquidity wey dey, di higher di impact.
settings.priceProtectionTooltip2: For di time between when you see quote and when your swap complete, price fit change. Slippage tolerance na di maximum price change wey you go accept before dem cancel di swap.
settings.priceProtectionDescription: Di most wey you ready to spend on a swap. Dis include di price impact of your swap and any Slippage on di token prices before dem execute di swap.
settings.twapTooltip1: TWAP trades on THORChain na wetin dem dey call "streaming swaps" for di documents and code.
settings.twapTooltip2: To place instant sell order, wey go give you di worst price execution, put 1 for di number of sub-swaps and 1 block for di time between sub-swaps.
settings.twapDescription: Plenty plenty users suppose use di default settings. Na only expert traders suppose change dis settings
settings.numberOfSubSwapsTooltip: Break your order into smaller trades wey dem dey call sub-swaps. Di more sub-swaps, di better di price execution. When you set am to zero, di protocol go calculate di number of sub-swaps for you so dat each one go get Slippage of 5 bps. Di default value na zero.
settings.timeBetweenSubSwapsTooltip: Time between each sub-swap wey dem measure in blocks. Di more blocks between each sub-swap, di better di price execution. If you choose zero blocks e go do plenty sub-swaps every block for faster execution. Di default value na zero blocks.

pool.noRunepoolPosition: No RUNEPool position found for this wallet.
